characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Ace Pilot: In addition to being Ohrangers, all of the Ohrangers are skilled pilots of the United Airforce Overtech Hardware. Contrasting Sequel Protagonist:To theKakurangersfrom the preceding series. The Kakurangers are descendants of legendary Ninjas from feudal Japan while the Ohrangers are from the military whose powers are tied from ancient civilizations.To theChangemenas military-based Sentai teams that fight invaders from outer space. The key difference between them is, while the Changemen's power derives from theEarth Forcewhile battling the invading alien forces, the Ohrangers' power is derived from Choriki energy, tied to ancient civilizations, which is tied to the origins of the robots that the Ohrangers battle.Both the Ohrangers and theGoggle-Vare a Sentai teams that were tied to ancient civilizations. While the Goggle-V are a science-based teams, the Ohrangers are military-based. To theKakurangersfrom the preceding series. The Kakurangers are descendants of legendary Ninjas from feudal Japan while the Ohrangers are from the military whose powers are tied from ancient civilizations. To theChangemenas military-based Sentai teams that fight invaders from outer space. The key difference between them is, while the Changemen's power derives from theEarth Forcewhile battling the invading alien forces, the Ohrangers' power is derived from Choriki energy, tied to ancient civilizations, which is tied to the origins of the robots that the Ohrangers battle. Both the Ohrangers and theGoggle-Vare a Sentai teams that were tied to ancient civilizations. While the Goggle-V are a science-based teams, the Ohrangers are military-based.

characters.name: Gorō Hoshino/Oh Red
characters.description: Cool Sword: Star Riser Experienced Protagonist: He had his Ohranger powers before the series began. In fact, he's the only Ohranger that transforms in the first episode, while the others get their powers in the next one. Law of Chromatic Superiority: He managed to link with theout of controlRed Puncher Robot, and is a Captain while his subordinates are all First Lieutenants. The Leader: He is the official leader of the sentai team. Meaningful Name: In Japanese, Go means Five and Hoshi means Star.

characters.name: Shouhei Yokkaichi/Oh Green
characters.description: Bare-Fisted Monk: Trained in Boxing. The Big Guy: Thanks to his background in boxing and heavy-to-wield Square Crushers, he is the team's heavy hitter. The Lancer: He is more impulsive and fun-loving in order to balance out his cool-headed and straight-laced commander. Best exemplified when he Applauded Bara Darts skillful display of his version of William Tell earning him aDope Slap. Meaningful Name: Yokkaichi means rectangle. Signature Move:Denko Choriki CrushernoteBlitzkrieg Super-Power Crusher

characters.name: Yuuji Mita/Oh Blue
characters.description: Distressed Dude: He ends up captured or tied up more often than any of the others. Friend to All Children: The team in general shares this trait, but he in particular stands out for his more kiddish qualities. He relates to them more. Kid-Appeal Character: Is the most prone to bumbling and gets along with kids. The Lancer: He's also one alongside Yokkaichi. His bumbling fool personality makes him another foil to Goro. Meaningful Name: His last name possess a kanji that means "three"

characters.name: Juri Nijou/Oh Yellow
characters.description: Action Girl: Ironically best exemplified in episode 23, showing someCrazy-Preparedskills in the process. Cordon Bleugh Chef: According to Shouhei, at least, her cooking is strange. Fake Defector: Pulled this on the team to get an antidote for a monster's poison,but her plan backfires. Girlish Pigtails: Wears them in several episodes. Kick Chick: Uses lots of kicks in her fighting style.

characters.name: Momo Maruo/Oh Pink
characters.description: Alliterative Name:MomoMaruo Born in the Wrong Century: Or at least decade, she is very nostalgic for older cities and styles of clothing. Force and Finesse: Uses Tai Chi as her fighting style as opposed to the more offensive fighting style of Juri. Luckily, My Shield Will Protect Me: Circle Defender is a defensive weapon, obviously. Meaningful Name: Momo Maruo means Pink Circle in Japanese.

characters.name: Riki/King Ranger
characters.description: Bling-Bling-BANG!: King Pyramider Bling of War: His armor and entire arsenal. So much so that, despite being officially designated as a Black Ranger, most of his gear and aura are more gold than they are blacknoteThe aura is typical "Black Ranger purple"only once, during the team henshinCold Openfor the final episode. His suit is the only thing about him more black than gold, but even the gold parts dominate the suit. Little wonderOhranger'sadaptationclassifies his counterpart as a Golden Ranger. Carry a Big Stick: King Stick Fish out of Temporal Water: Now that he is awakened in the present. Funny Bruce Lee Noises: Despite predating the man by millions of years. Most prominent when voiced by Takumi Hashimoto and later played by Shinta Takaiwa.

characters.name: Naoyuki Miura
characters.description: Crazy-Prepared: He occasionally comes up with contingency plans, so he can stay one step ahead of Baranoia. My Greatest Failure: He actually has two of these moments.One for not being able to save Endo, a fellow officer, and fearing his daughter Mitsuko hated him, prompting him to act on personal feelings when she gets targeted by a monster.One for creating Red Puncher when he had just learned how to harvest and synthesize Choriki, but the resulting robot was untamable and caused the death of its pilot, Lt. Kirino, by burying itself under a rock avalanche. He then decided to leave Red Puncher in its grave, and was against using it in battle. One for not being able to save Endo, a fellow officer, and fearing his daughter Mitsuko hated him, prompting him to act on personal feelings when she gets targeted by a monster. One for creating Red Puncher when he had just learned how to harvest and synthesize Choriki, but the resulting robot was untamable and caused the death of its pilot, Lt. Kirino, by burying itself under a rock avalanche. He then decided to leave Red Puncher in its grave, and was against using it in battle. Rank Scales with Asskicking: He is the leader of the United Air Force and can kick major ass if he needs to.

characters.name: Dorin
characters.description: Disney Death:Was killed at the hands of Maltihua. She gets better in the finale. A Dog Named "Dog": She's a member of the Dorin race named Dorin from the planet Dorin. Fish out of Temporal Water: Also like Riki, she's a girl from the past living in the present day. Friend to All Living Things: Wild animals will rally themselves in her defense of their own accord. Living MacGuffin: Contains the source of the Choriki powers, thus making her a central importance to the storyline.

characters.name: Paku
characters.description: Reptiles Are Abhorrent: Inverted, he's a friendly lizard. Satellite Character: He only serves as Dorin's pet and nothing more.

characters.name: Gunmajin
characters.description: Benevolent Genie: He is a literal genie, means well, and never goes too far in morally questionable territory while granting wishes.Also, he is upfront in saying he will not grant wishes he doesn't like, or wishes that aren't fun.When told to "punish bullies", while he does scare them by putting them very high on a branch and blowing his giant breath at them, he does not go any further, so he clearly has a sense of what is disproportionate and what is a fitting punishment.He will also grant righteous wishes like helping Ohranger to beat the bad guys, no questions asked. Also, he is upfront in saying he will not grant wishes he doesn't like, or wishes that aren't fun. When told to "punish bullies", while he does scare them by putting them very high on a branch and blowing his giant breath at them, he does not go any further, so he clearly has a sense of what is disproportionate and what is a fitting punishment. He will also grant righteous wishes like helping Ohranger to beat the bad guys, no questions asked. Blue-and-Orange Morality: In his debut appearance, where he had no problem attacking and imprisoning Yuuji in order to coerce the location of Ohblocker from him (as his current master wanted to ride in the mecha). He also refused to grant Bomber the Great's wish to help him conquer the Earth not out of any moral objections, but because he didn't find the wish "amusing".

characters.name: Emperor Bacchushund
characters.description: The founding ruler of Baranoia, he is a survivor of an attempted Machine Beast revolt on the Pangaean civilization who escaped and established an empire on planet Baranoia.He's destroyed by the Ohrangers midway into the series, but his head survives. When Hysterrier and Buldont are banished from the Baranoia Empire by Bomber the Great, Bacchushund uses the last of his powers to turn his son into Kaiser Buldont and help him reclaim the throne. Back for the Dead: Twice.First buried under rubble and magma when the Blocker robots destroyed his Super Machine Beast base before the appearance of aSpace Metal Swordempowered him into a new giant form before his body is destroyed by Ohblocker.His head ends up on another planet, giving Buldont his remaining power before shutting down for good. First buried under rubble and magma when the Blocker robots destroyed his Super Machine Beast base before the appearance of aSpace Metal Swordempowered him into a new giant form before his body is destroyed by Ohblocker. His head ends up on another planet, giving Buldont his remaining power before shutting down for good. Bad Boss: Killed the Bara Cactus siblings for showing more loyalty to each other than to him.

characters.name: Empress Hysterrier
characters.description: Alas, Poor Villain: It's not hard to feel sympathy for herafter she commits suicide just after becoming a grandmother. Character Development: From a heartless machine toa kind-hearted grandmother in the end before she died. Clipped-Wing Angel: Dowager Empress Hysterrier. Using most of her energy to summon Maltihua causes Hysterrier toage, with whitened plating and forced to use Bacchushund's staff as a walking stick. Driven to Suicide:She chose to die as a "thank you" for the Ohrangers sparing her grandson. Even Evil Has Loved Ones: She truly cares for her entire family.

characters.name: Prince/Kaiser Bulldont
characters.description: Action Dad: After Bulldont Jr. is born. Avenging the Villain: Part of his motivation that led him to become an effective ruler was tomake the Ohrangers pay for killing his father Bacchushund. The Bad Guy Wins:One of the few villains inSuper Sentaihistory to actually conquer Earth and rule it for a while before his ultimate defeat. Battle Couple: With Princess Maltihua. One of their attacks is even called "Love-Love Pair Attack". Big Bad:Becomes the emperor of the Baranoia Empire after reclaiming the throne from Bomber the Great, and becomes the final antagonist of the series alongside Princess Multihua.

characters.name: Princess/Empress Maltihua
characters.description: Action Mom: After Bulldont Jr. is born. Battle Couple: With Kaiser Buldont. One of their attacks is even called "Love-Love Pair Attack". Big Damn Heroes: Villian variant. She saves Bomber from the Ohrangers, only she and Buldont to personally punish him. Even Evil Has Loved Ones: She absolutelyadoresKaiser Buldont, and is also fond of their baby, Bulldont Jr. Kissing Cousins: Marries and has a child with her cousin, Bulldont. However, it should be noted they're only cousins by title as they're machines made by Bacchushund.

characters.name: Bomber the Great
characters.description: Artificial Limbs: Granted, his limbs were already mechanical, but after Bulldont sliced off his right hand and Maltihua shot off his left, they replaced them witha swordandbomb-shaped blaster. Bad Boss: To Acha and Kocha whenever he needs to take out his frustrations on them. Big Bad Wannabe: Sought to take over Baranoia as the new emperor, but his reign is short lived when Buldont has Maltihua turn him into their slave. Can't Kill You, Still Need You: He kept Buldont and Hysterrier alive because he wanted to use a ruling in Baranoia's sucession to remove them once the time is right. Defeat Equals Explosion: A rare aversion, since his body still hadone more function to perform.

characters.name: Machine Beast Tamer Keris
characters.description: Actor Allusion: Not the first time Kurusu played arobotics scientist. Animal Motif: Butterflies. They are seen in her area and when transforming into her true form. Arc Villain: Of episodes 26-28. The Beastmaster: She oversees and trains Machine Beasts. It's even in her title. Big Beautiful Woman: In her true form.

characters.name: Butlers Acha and Kocha
characters.description: Battle Butler: They will occasionally fight in battles in order to assist in aMonster of the Weekattack, thus they don't just limit their visits to Earth to monster enlargements. Big Guy, Little Guy: Acha is a human-sized, Kocha is about the size of a cat. Bumbling Henchmen Duo: They're kind of like evil versions ofR2-D2 and C-3POas far as their attitudes towards each other are concerned. Catchphrase: Kocha tends to say, "Grow big and strong!" when enlarging a Machine Beast. Chronic Backstabbing Disorder: When Bomber the Great took power, they became his toadies before briefly joining Buldont when he gets Ganmajin and then good after he became Kaizer Buldont. Hysterrier and Buldont when lampshade the duo's antics on the subject with the latter more forgiving.

characters.name: Machine Beasts
characters.description: Arm Cannon: Bara Drill sports two small guns on its arms. The Bus Came Back: Returns in Episode 33 as part of Bacchus Wrath's "Magma Enhancement" plot. Starter Villain: The first Machine Beast to fight the Ohrangers, even though by that point, Goro was the only one who had the powers to fight back. This Is a Drill: Sports a big one at the center of its body. The Voiceless: Didn't speak in any of its appearances.

characters.name: Sei'ichi Kuroda
characters.description: Corrupted Character Copy: A darker take on Dr. Tenma fromAstro Boy, both being driven mad by the death of a son and creating a robotic replacement. By while Tenma is a sympatheticAnti-Villainwho sent away Astro upon realizing that he could never truly replace his so Tobio, Kuroda is aMisanthrope Supremewilling to align himself with Baranoia for hiswarped idealsand has no qualms over Shigeru being a replacement for his son. Horrifying the Horror: He outright scares Bacchushund, a robot supremacist, with a speech of hating his own people. Madden Into Misanthropy: Lost his son to a car crash and later his wife, growing to hate humans for being frail. Power Of Hate: The core of his ideals.

characters.name: Prince Bulldont Jr.
characters.description: Children Are Innocent: The motivation for keeping him alive; he has the potential to be good despite being born from evil parents. Dead Guy Junior:Subverted. He was named before his parents' demise. Happily Adopted:Ends up on being raised by Gunmajin, Acha and Kocha. Walking Spoiler: He appears only in the final two episodes andhis well-being is the motivation behind Hysterrier'sHeel–Face Turn.
